title: Income Distribution Minute Template Creator GPT Knowledge Manifest

recommended_gpt.name: Australian Trust Income Distribution Minute Template Assistant
recommended_gpt.description: Reviews Australian trust deeds, prepares a checklist for approval, and uses an action service to create a deed-specific income distribution minute template.
recommended_gpt.actions: Use the OpenAPI schema in openapi/income-distribution-minute-template-creator-action.openapi.yaml once the service is deployed.

matter_document_handling: Matter documents should be uploaded only inside the relevant GPT chat. Word templates stay in the action service environment, not GPT Knowledge.
scope: Action-backed extraction, checklist approval, validation, final checklist DOCX and deed-specific income distribution minute template DOCX generation.
